description:
Seedance 2.0 delivers high‑quality video generation across text and image inputs — built for cinematic scenes, consistent characters, and detailed motion control.
Cost estimate - $0.1442 per second at 480p (10300 tokens per second), $0.3094 per second at 720p (22100 tokens per second) at a rate of $0.014 per 1000 tokens.
